title: helichrysum lineatum
intro: Helichrysum lineatum, also known as annual strawflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow and orange daisy-like flowers. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Helichrysum lineatum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum lineatum can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
